title: 2pk / 6pk Ice Cube Trays Fruit Shape Mould Silicone for Easy pop Out Cocktails Parties (2X Watermelon Trays)
features: DIMENSIONS - Approximately 21cm x 11cm - Suitable for most freezers
FOOD GRADE SAFE MATERIAL - Made from flexible Silicone and BPA free material for easy cleaning and dishwasher use
NOVELTY DESIGNS FOR ENTERTAINING GUESTS - Makes cute fruit shapes Ice Cubes to put in cocktails, displays etc.
MULTIPURPOSE - Great for freezing Coffee for use in Iced coffee, pop molds, freezing yoghurt, freezing soup, baby food, sauces and various confectionary
USEFUL TIP: To make clearer ice, boil water first then allow to cool before placing in trays or use distilled water.
description: FRUIT SHAPED ICE CUBE TRAYS DIMENSIONS - Approximately 21cm x 11cm - Suitable for most freezers FOOD GRADE SAFE MATERIAL - Made from flexible Silicone and BPA free material for easy cleaning and dishwasher use NOVELTY DESIGNS FOR ENTERTAINING GUESTS - Makes cute fruit shapes Ice Cubes to put in cocktails, displays etc. MULTIPURPOSE - Great for freezing Coffee for use in Iced coffee, pop molds, freezing yoghurt, freezing soup, baby food, sauces and various confectionary USEFUL TIP: To make clearer ice, boil water first then allow to cool before placing in trays or use distilled water.
